name: Hon. (Dr.) Susil  Premajayantha, M.P.
academic_qualifications: Doctarate in Public Administration, Horizons University Paris, France 2021 Master of Public Administration, PIM, University of Sri Jayawardenepura - 2004 LLB. University Of Colombo -1982
professional_qualifications: Attorney-at-Law, Law College of Sri Lanka 1985 Other: Part I and Part II Examinations of the Institute of Bankers Sri Lanka, 1982 Followed Short Term Leadership Program at Kennedy School of Government, Harvard University, USA 2007 Attended Regional workshops in Singapore and Malaysia in 2017 and 2018 to introduce STEM education.
